name: Hawthorne Country Club
about: Hawthorne Country Club is a private member-owned facility in Southern Maryland, offering an 18-hole golf course with 6,013 yards of play at par 72. The venue includes a golf simulator, a restaurant and bar, and amenities for pool, tennis, and pickleball. It is situated on Route 225 outside La Plata, Maryland, overlooking the Port Tobacco Valley. The club operates with a membership model, allowing access to its golf facilities, athletic amenities, and social event spaces.
why_golfers_like_it: Private member-owned club offering an exclusive golfing experience
Golf simulator technology available for year-round play and practice
Scenic course views overlooking the Port Tobacco Valley
Comprehensive athletic and social amenities beyond golf
Multiple membership options tailored to different player needs

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant and bar available for members and event guests
Restaurant and bar service available; no BYOB mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Simulator hardware not specified in the content

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Members and guests are typically expected to bring their own clubs for simulator play, though rental options may be available upon request.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not specified; the venue offers an on-site restaurant and bar for members and guests.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Simulator session times are not specified, but typical simulator rounds take 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers family-oriented amenities including pool, tennis, pickleball, and hosts events that suggest a welcoming environment for families.
